resources.string: This application is a trading simulator for educational and entertainment purposes only. The AI-generated data consists of technical indicators derived from historical market data and does not constitute financial or investment advice. No real trading is executed on live exchanges through this application. Virtual balances have no monetary value and cannot be withdrawn, exchanged, or converted to real currency or cryptocurrency.
Educational technical analysis. Not financial advice. No real trades are executed.
Educational technical analysis. Not financial advice.
historical pattern strength — not a prediction
Scroll to the end to continue
Get alerted when your levels hit?

TradeLab sends a notification when a pair crosses a price or indicator level you set, plus an optional daily indicator digest. Alerts are educational and informational only — they are never trading instructions, and nothing is ever traded on your behalf. You can customise or mute every alert type in Settings.
Alerts need notification access to reach you.
Purchases unlock app features and virtual funds only. Virtual balances have no real-world value and cannot be withdrawn or converted.
